candidate.name: Broken fixture: not-a-pna posture on a membership report

summary.headline: Deliberately broken fixture: posture not-a-pna on a Mode-1 (membership) report. not-a-pna is exclusive to goal-impact reports — a PNA claimant gets a membership verdict, never a category dodge. report-fixtures-lint MUST flag this (exit 1).

findings.rationale: Fixture filler so the findings array is otherwise valid.
